fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip:
Contains the application area of the item budget. The options are:
Sales: The budget was set up in Sales & Receivables
Purchase: The budget was set up in Purchases & Payables

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item budget.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item budget.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Budget Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a dimension code for Item Budget Dimension 1.

fields.name: Budget Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a dimension code for Item Budget Dimension 2.

fields.name: Budget Dimension 3 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a dimension code for Item Budget Dimension 3.
